headline: Private Credit’s Big Arbitrage Trade Gains Backing From Advisers
summary: (Bloomberg) -- On paper, it seems like a no-brainer trade: Cash out of one private credit fund at 100% of net asset value and plow the money back into a similar vehicle that’s trading at a substantially discounted price.Most Read from BloombergInvestor Who Scored 900% Win in 2008 Crisis Has New Big Short BetGrand Ole Opry House Up For Sale by Owner Ryman HospitalityStocks Slide as Wall Street Gets AI Wake-Up Call: Markets WrapStocks Climb Late After Micron’s Blowout Outlook: Markets WrapOracle C
